ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resistance_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "resistance_ohms" REAL /* Resistance measured in ohms */,
  "current_A" REAL /* Current flowing through the material in amperes */,
  "test_time" REAL /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "min_resistance" REAL /* Minimum resistance recorded during the test */,
  "max_resistance" REAL /* Maximum resistance recorded during the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being tested */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test session */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the measurement */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage applied during the measurement */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_measurements_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resistance_measurements_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sample */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material being tested */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was prepared or entered */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sample */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the sample */,
  "sample_preparation_method" TEXT /* Method used to prepare the sample */,
  "sample_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the sample */,
  "sample_area" REAL /* Area of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test session took place */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer conducting the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the test session in minutes */,
  "test_setup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test setup used */,
  "test_environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the test (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the engineer in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the engineer belongs to */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications the engineer has */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement parameter (e.g., voltage, temperature) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test session */,
  "average_resistance" REAL /* Average resistance measured during the test session */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted in the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Final status of the test (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "min_resistance" REAL /* Minimum resistance measured during the test session */,
  "max_resistance" REAL /* Maximum resistance measured during the test session */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the resistance measurements */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the resistance measurements */,
  "test_conclusion" TEXT /* Detailed conclusion of the test session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test session */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of any issues encountered */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was made */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., Error, Warning, Info) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., Minor, Major, Critical) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Engineer who resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
